title: Alien Exchange Student Letter
text:
## Alien Exchange Student Letter

Dear host family, my name is {person} and I come from {place}.

I am excited to study {plural noun}, taste {food}, and learn why humans {verb} their {object} every morning.

Please do not be alarmed by my {color} {body part} or the {animal} that follows me {adverb}.

On my planet, we show {emotion} by {verb ending in -ing}.

I packed {number} gifts, one {adjective} {noun} for your school principal, and a {color} {object} for the {job}.
